Module Configuration — Qty & Watt Peak
⚡ Power Generation Potential
💰 Module Material Cost
$1 = ₹
¥1 = ₹
⇄ Three ways to calculate: (1) Set Module Qty → all rows auto-calculate. (2) Type Required Qty → back-calculates Module Qty + Power. (3) Type Generation value + unit → back-calculates Module Qty + Required Qty. Each row is independent. Click ↺ to reset any row.

Consolidated Material Requirements vs Stock
🔗 Smart Stock Mapping: Materials are auto-matched to stock items using keywords, dimensions & specs. Click the 🔗 button on any row to manually override the mapping. Click the ❌ button to discard materials you don't need.
Material Details Requirement Stock Analysis Actions
Material Group Technical Specifications UOM Per Module Used By Material Code Total Modules Required Qty Mapped Stock Item(s) Available Shortage / Surplus Discard / Map
Detailed Material Breakdown per Module Type
Module Type Material Group Technical Specifications UOM Material Code Qty / Module Wastage % Consumption Module Qty Required Qty Available Stock Shortage (Buy) Status
Customer-wise Material Requirements & Stock Mapping
🔗 Customer Stock Mapping: Map specific stock items to each customer. If not mapped, the global/default mapping is used. Click 🔗 Map on any material to assign specific stock items for that customer.
⚡ Stock Capacity — Materials in Watt / kW / MW / GW
⚡ Stock Capacity: Shows how many modules and how much power (W/kW/MW/GW) your current stock can support for each material. The bottleneck material limits actual production capacity.
Material Stock ⚡ Production Capacity from Stock
Material Group Specification UOM Per Module Stock Qty Mapped Item(s) Modules Possible Watt (W) Kilowatt (kW) MW / GW
Module Type Material Group Specification UOM Per Module Module Wp Stock Qty Modules Possible Power Capacity

Global Pricing Controls — Editing any value overwrites all rows
Total Amount GLOBAL
$
Blended $/Wp GLOBAL
$
Avg $/Cell GLOBAL
$
⇄ Every value is editable & calculates the rest: Cell Size + Eff% auto-fill Wp/Cell. Edit Total Wp, $/Wp, $/Cell or Amount on any row to back-calculate the others. Global controls above overwrite all row pricing at once.
